nodes.context: Designates the mafia structures of Corsican origin, active in Corsica, Marseille, and other regions.
Main Corsican mafia organization from the 1980s to the 2000s.
Important Corsican mafia gang based in Ajaccio, prominent since the 2010s.
US mafia that received heroin from the Corsican mafia via the French Connection.

edges.evidence_quote: Dagli anni '80 agli anni 2000 la principale organizzazione era quella che andava sotto il nome di " Brezza del Mare " ( Brise de Mer ).
edges.context: Brise de Mer was the main organization within the Corsican mafia from the 1980s to the 2000s.

edges.evidence_quote: La fascia più importante sarebbe quella dei "Petit Bar" di Ajaccio .
edges.context: Petit Bar is described as the most important gang within the Corsican mafia since the 2010s.

edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta i suoi clan costituivano la French Connection , massiccio traffico di eroina verso gli USA destinata perlopiù alla mafia statunitense .
edges.context: Corsican mafia clans supplied heroin to the American Mafia via the French Connection in the 1970s.
